color_map: blue = HG (high acetaldehyde concentration group, group_1); red/orange = LG (low acetaldehyde concentration group, group_0)
notes: Legend states significant differences between HG (blue) and LG (red); taxa marked with * or † above the bars are treated as the reported differentially-abundant set (rest of the 22 taxa plotted show no significance marker). Direction is blue(HG=group_1) vs red(LG=group_0) median bar height. Veillonella parvula (†) has both bars essentially flat/near-zero (grey, indistinguishable) at this image resolution, so direction could not be determined even though it is flagged significant.
